performance.description: Updated when Performance (Piece 14, New Relic APM) runs. Used as window start (SINCE) for next run. Not gated by any Trello item yet. CONFIRMED 2026-07-09 by user: now part of every Full Run + cron run (both projects), report must include full topErrors + slowestTransactions detail tables every time, not just a summary line.
performance.note: 2026-07-10 07:05: OhCleo apdex 0.95, avg 629ms. NEW error: column app_media.cached_relevance_score does not exist (36x) — not seen before, needs a migration. 3 known slow media endpoints (MediaByKeyView 18s/MediaRecommendsView 8s/HomeMediasView 7.8s) still unaddressed, plus a new MediaAddTrackAPIView.post at 35s (2 calls). MPFC apdex dropped to 0.52 — dominated by vulnerability-scanner probes (.env.php.swm, cfgs.php, gebase.php69, Login.php all 400-600s) rather than real traffic; also one new real fatal: Call to undefined method stdClass::add_database() in db-config.php:284.
performance.prior_note_20260709_1033: 2026-07-09 10:33: user confirmed Performance should run automatically every time going forward (was on-demand only) and report must show full detail tables (all topErrors + all slowestTransactions rows), not just the summary — skill file .claude/commands/me/daily-report.md updated accordingly (Full Run piece list + Piece 14 section). Findings this run: OhCleo apdex 0.93, password_reset_code_expires_at migration error from Jul 8 is FIXED, but the 3 slow endpoints (MediaRecommendsView 20s/HomeMediasView 18s/MediaByKeyView 11s) are still slow, 2nd day unaddressed. MPFC apdex dropped to 0.54 (poor) — real cause: SQL injection scanner probing /search/ with WAITFOR DELAY payloads (12-14s response times), plus a broken JSON API plugin method call and transient DB DNS resolution failures. No Trello item exists for Performance yet.
performance.prior_note_20260708_1429: 2026-07-08 14:29: First real report run (ohcleo only, 24h window). apdex 0.91, avg resp 1373ms, error rate 2.14% (650/30431, mostly NotAuthenticated 603 — benign). Found 2 real issues written to reports/2026-07-08/daily-report.md as ALERTS #10-11: (1) django.db.utils.ProgrammingError column app_user.password_reset_code_expires_at does not exist ×6 — likely missing prod DB migration, breaks password reset. (2) 3 core endpoints (MediaRecommendsView/HomeMediasView/MediaByKeyView) averaging 15-21s over hundreds of calls/day — real backend bottleneck, not edge case. MPFC not re-run this pass (ohcleo only requested). Earlier 14:35 note had a future-dated last_run bug (script clamped since-window to 1 min because last_run was ahead of actual now) — corrected here to real current time.

arthur_monitor.description: Updated when /daily-report arthur (Piece 13) runs (manual, on-demand only, no cron). Used as the start time for the next incremental run. IMPORTANT: last_run must equal the actual timestamp through which data was verified/read, NOT the time the feature/command finished running or being built. If a source could not be verified this run (e.g. Slack auth failure), do NOT advance last_run past the last point where ALL 5 sources were verified together — advancing it would silently skip that source's unread window on the next run.
arthur_monitor.note: 2026-07-09 10:10: All 5 sources verified. Arthur Trello item had been wrongly auto-completed with zero check run — reverted, ran full check, re-completed after. Slack auth fix: cookie-extraction-based token refresh failed (David's Google session showed 'Signed out' in the extraction browser), but user clarified the correct method is to use David's REAL Chrome Profile 15 directly (already logged in on the visible display) — opened solid-code-team.slack.com in Profile 15, confirmed logged in, extracted a fresh xoxc token from that profile's Local Storage leveldb + the `d` cookie from its Cookies DB via get-david-slack-cookies.py, verified via auth.test (user=namtv). Memory updated: never attempt cookie-file extraction as primary path for this account, always start from a live Profile 15 browser session. Found real content: Chris delivered a P0/P1/P2 priority requirements list post-demo (P0 deadline Thursday — funded demo agent, provenance UI, YouTube connect fix, hosted-platform-pocket question), team started a new Trello board (Art K + Nick), one credential (Trello password) shared in plaintext in Slack. GitHub commits (8, Jul-8 06:48-10:34) corroborate the demo-fix work described in chat.
arthur_monitor.prior_note_20260709_0940: 2026-07-09 09:40: user asked why Arthur item was marked complete on Trello with no report run today — it was wrong, reverted to incomplete (auto-completed by an all-alertless-items sweep despite this piece being on-demand-only and never actually invoked). Ran Matrix (2 rooms, both verified) — nothing new beyond Jul 8's known Chris-demo-ok/bug-#3 status. Slack (Aysar DM/ms-v3/msv3-official) NOT verified — David's Google-linked session came back 'Signed out' when attempting token refresh, needs live user login. last_run intentionally NOT advanced past 13:33 Jul-8 per this field's own rule (all 5 sources must verify together) — next run will recheck Matrix redundantly but won't skip Slack's unread window.
arthur_monitor.prior_note_20260708_1345: 2026-07-08 13:45 run: Matrix token finally recovered after a long debugging saga this session (persisted browser-profile session was fine all along — earlier failures were self-inflicted: decrypt-secrets.sh clobbered a working token at ~10:51, then repeated pkill/parallel-script interference against the same tmp/matrix-browser-profile corrupted that session further; a clean single run of matrix-token-refresh.js succeeded immediately). Content: Nam compiling action-item list from msv3-official for Arthur review; Chris sent an unread payment-related image (not yet OCRd); team spent ~12min (12:17-13:33) internally confused about a Chris message re: how Thor integrates with MCP (header vs tool-call-arg) — resolved on their own, deferred the technical change to after the demo per Arthur, no action needed. Technical room: no new messages. Tonight ~23:30 VN is the critical go/no-go call (row 8) — still the main thing to watch.

weekly_report.description: Updated when weekly report runs (Friday night/Saturday morning).

daily_report.description: Updated when daily report runs (~8AM). Used as start time for next daily report.
caveats: Recheck 09:58 Jul-10 (user pushed back hard: 'so many checklist not done, a lot of out of date data, I said many times, you keep wrong'): pulled Trello LIVE instead of trusting prior write-up. Found 2 real report bugs: (1) 'Check Mail: 1/6 complete' was stale text never updated after the 09:14 fix -- real state is 6/6, card already auto-closed. (2) Blair Brown - Peptide Clyde was marked incomplete in the write-up but user had already checked it directly in Trello -- real state 9/22 not 8/22. Then did genuine live re-verification (not deferred) on every other open item: Maddy (Kai active this AM but still hasn't answered Madhuraka's estimate ask, confirmed via fresh search.messages), TuanNT/KhanhHH (re-pulled Workstream post-relogin, both still genuinely 0h Jul9, gates stay open for real reasons not access gaps), Aysar MPDM (re-checked conversations.history, still silent since Jul6), MPFC/Ohcleo Slack (re-searched, zero new messages, still unanswered), Fountain Trello board (re-pulled comment actions, both kunalsheth asks still unanswered), Elena WordPress (curl'd live CSP header directly, region1.google-analytics.com still missing), Discord nusvinn (ran mandatory 3-step curl check, genuine 401 not false-403; opened a fresh visible Chrome window Profile19 DISPLAY:1 for human login, still pending). Philip MS Teams: built a targeted script to click the correct (External)/Six Star Rentals duplicate specifically (8+ duplicates exist) -- still failed after 2 attempts, genuine automation limitation, not something to keep re-trying blind each run.

Recheck 09:38 Jul-10 (interactive, user asked about OhCleo New Relic + reacted to Workstream expiry): (1) New Relic OhCleo cached_relevance_score confirmed FALSE ALARM via direct NerdGraph timeseries query — all 36 occurrences confined to Jul9 09:36-10:36 burst, zero before/since, zero last 60min. Tied to Tony's track-ranking deploy, self-resolved. (2) Workstream SSO expired a SECOND time after the 08:39 same-morning recheck already fixed it — root cause: workstream-login.js's visible-browser auto-SSO wait was hardcoded to 60s, too short for a human to switch windows + enter credentials. Bumped to 5min (scripts/workstream-login.js:105), relaunched, user logged in successfully. Fresh data reveals LongVV 9h (Maddy/Xtreme), PhucVT 8h (Crystal lang), LeNH 8h (James Diamond) all genuinely logged Jul9 — resolves the cron run's Matrix-only-inferred ambiguity for 3 of 5 devs. TuanNT + KhanhHH still 0h across all visible projects Jul9, unchanged, gates stay open. Did not re-verify other still-open items this pass (Maddy/Fountain/MPFC/Ohcleo unanswered messages, Discord/Upwork/MSTeams human-login blockers, Elena WordPress CSP, Blair Brown review, 5 Zoho accounts) — all unchanged from 08:39/08:58, not redone within the same hour without new signal.

Recheck 08:39 Jul-10 (interactive, report already existed): Precognize (nusken now authenticated) + Workstream access (SSO restored) both resolved. New Workstream needsReview alerts surfaced now that access is back: Radio Data Center KhanhHH 5h35m Jul8 (reviewer LeNH), Crystal lang PhucVT 8h Jul9 (reviewer TienND) — Fountain excluded per standing rule. TuanNT/KhanhHH/LeNH still show genuine 0h Jul9 in Workstream too (matches sheets, not just an access gap) — stays consistent with cron's Matrix-confirmed-real-work-not-yet-logged explanation, no reminder sent. Aysar/Baamboozle MPDM now 5 days silent (was 4 at cron time). Discord nusvinn + 5 Zoho accounts (carrick/nick/rick/kai/ken) retried directly, still genuinely broken, unchanged. Maddy/MPFC/Ohcleo/Fountain-board unanswered items re-verified via live Slack/Trello queries — still unanswered, not new alerts, same items. Upwork carrick session unexpectedly cleared (now authenticated) — not gating anything. MS Teams Philip login succeeded (no longer blocked by MS security wall) but message-extraction still unreliable, left incomplete.

Jul-10 07:05 cron run: Check Progress 8/22 complete. Biggest item: Blair Brown (Peptide Clyde) billing dispute — customer disputed 68h50m, team reconciled to 28h10m overnight (Jul9 09:19-Jul10 02:37), sent to customer — new dedicated Trello item added, needs your review. Workstream fully inaccessible this run (SSO session expired at browser-profile level, not just token — landed on a real email/password form, no stored cred; direct refresh_token grant also failed with unauthorized_client) — Sheets alone showed 0h for all 5 PHP-team devs on Jul 9, but cross-checked against Matrix (603 msgs, 26/132 active rooms) which showed all 5 genuinely active that day (LongVV/OhCleo bug fixes, PhucVT/Arthur logged, TuanNT/Paturevision prod fix, KhanhHH dental-disrupted, LeNH on the Blair Brown reconciliation) — no reminders sent, would repeat the well-documented false-alarm pattern. 5 Zoho email accounts (carrick/nick/rick/kai/ken) all returned genuine 'Invalid credentials' simultaneously — needs new app passwords, not fixable by agent. davidztv19@gmail.com (Arthur email monitor) found completely missing from config (not just misconfigured) — needs re-adding. Discord nusvinn + Upwork (carrick) + MS Teams (will/Philip) all hit real human-required challenges (Discord login page, Upwork CAPTCHA, Microsoft 'unusual activity' wall) after genuine visible-browser retries — none resolvable without a human at the keyboard. gh CLI only has duongdn + mypersonalfootballcoach authenticated in this environment — nuscarrick/nusken missing, blocked Baamboozle/Bizurk GitHub issue checks + Precognize PR check. New Relic found a new OhCleo DB error (cached_relevance_score column missing, 36x) and a new MPFC PHP fatal (undefined method add_database()). New Elena WordPress CSP gap: region1.google-analytics.com blocked.

Correction 10:15 Jul-9 (user: 'LeNH: wrong, check again' — 2nd correction on the SAME dev/day, this time on MY OWN earlier fix): my 09:20 correction claimed LeNH had '8h on Peptide Clyde' — this was itself wrong, a project-attribution error. Ran full unfiltered all-20-project Workstream dump (not just isolated single-dev filter) to cross-check: LeNH's real Jul 8 total is 8.58h across TWO projects — Portfolio-James Diamond 8h + Peptide Clyde 0.58h. Isolated rescan confirms same figure. Lesson: when correcting a combined-scan miss, don't stop at the first isolated-rescan number — cross-verify against a fully unfiltered all-projects dump too, since even the isolated single-project-name output can mislabel which project the hours are actually on. Also re-verified KhanhHH's 1.5h (Peptide Clyde 0.25h + ETZ-Wathaga 1.25h) via the same 3-way check (combined scan + isolated rescan + unfiltered dump) after user said KhanhHH 'working on multiple projects right now' — all 3 methods agree, 1.5h across 2 projects stands, not a miss this time.

Correction 09:45 Jul-9 (5 more user-caught items in rapid succession, same session): (1) TuanNT/LeNH 0h were BOTH false — isolated single-dev rescans found TuanNT 8h (Paturevision) and LeNH 8h (Peptide Clyde/Workstream), the combined 5-dev scan silently dropped both; John Yi + Rebecca re-completed on Trello. (2) PhucVT genuinely 0h, confirmed twice — reminder sent to PhucVT only, NOT LeNH. (3) Email piece was entirely false — cron ran a hardcoded-window dated script (daily-email-scan-260703.js, frozen at 2026-07-04) instead of live window; live IMAP recheck found real missed alerts: rick@ Fountain BugSnag/Rollbar production errors (SocketError, RuntimeError, ActiveStorage, RoutingError #80/#81, FirstProject prod error #1054) and vuongtrancr@ 4x New Relic 'Signal lost' (Swish). (4) Maddy JIRA comment check: user asked if there were new comments — found real one (LIFM2-428, Kai, Jul 7) alongside the genuinely-silent PR review threads (0 dev replies confirmed via Bitbucket API on all 4 flagged PRs) — nuanced the alert to distinguish 'Kai inactive' (false) from 'PR review findings unaddressed' (true). (5) Upwork 'Rory (carrick) session expired — headless re-login failed' was stale/never rechecked — visible-browser retry succeeded instantly (already authenticated) for both carrick and david2. User set a standing rule: expired sessions must get a visible-browser retry, and if genuinely unresolved go in ALERTS SUMMARY as a real alert, never passive status text.

Correction 09:15 Jul-9 (user caught, angry, 3rd+ repeat): report wrongly flagged 'Kai no daily report Jul 8' (Maddy) and 'Carrick MPDM empty Jul 8' (Aysar) as alerts — both struck through in the report with corrections. Kai simply didn't work Jul 8 (check retired entirely, see feedback_kai_daily_report_gate.md). User explicitly wants wrong report lines struck through (~~text~~ + correction), not silently deleted, going forward for any post-feedback correction.

(1) Matrix token expired both refresh_token+browser-SSO first try (network ETIMEDOUT mid-poll) — DO NOT use matrix-device-auth.js (URL+code) as fallback, user explicitly rejected that flow; retried DISPLAY=:1 matrix-token-refresh.js (visible browser, user clicks directly) and it succeeded 2nd try. Fountain Part1 + full Matrix piece re-run clean, no new alerts, OhCleo email-deliverability incident (DNS/CNAME on notify.ohcleo.com) already resolved same-day via sender switch. (2) Workstream SSO was actually fine once re-logged in (cron's headless login just failed) — re-ran sheets-tasklog-scan.js for all 5 devs on 07-08 with live WS: PhucVT/TuanNT/LeNH genuinely 0h no leave (real alerts, not cron gaps) — reverted John Yi/Rebecca/James Diamond Trello items the cron wrongly auto-completed off Slack-only data. Sheets re-run + reviewer-logic correction 14:2x Jul-8 (user requested employee-hours re-run for TODAY, not PREV_DATE): all 5 devs 0h on 07-08 so far, verified both per-dev isolated scans AND unfiltered all-project Workstream dump — day genuinely in progress (14:03), not an alert. LongVV has a PENDING (unapproved) half-day leave request for this morning (father's surgery) — noted, not yet approved so treated as working. Workstream needs-review check: FIRST VERSION WRONG — guessed reviewer=project Manager/Tech Lead role, user corrected (James Diamond→PhucVT not DuongDN, Radio Data Center→LeNH not DuongDN). Real source: `/pinfo/projects/{id}`'s per-member `isReviewer` flag (independent of role). Script fixed to fetch this. Crystal lang further needed a manual override (`REVIEWER_OVERRIDES` map) — system flag itself wrongly shows DuongDN via Tech Lead auto-rule, user confirmed real reviewer is TienND. Fountain excluded from this check entirely per user instruction. Corrected findings: Radio Data Center 2h (KhanhHH) pending LeNH's review; James Diamond 16h (LeNH) pending PhucVT's review; Crystal lang 9h (PhucVT) pending TienND's review (override). None are DuongDN's own action item — ALERT #9 retracted, kept as informational only.
